inventory_role: records the obligations required before any restricted target to ZeroDayClosure edge can be attempted

required_obligations.obligation: extract terminal composition closure content from RestrictedCompositionTarget
show RestrictedBoundaryInvariant(T) is sufficient for restricted closure use only
show TargetRealizesRestrictedLiftSourceChainComposition(C,T) supports only the restricted target edge
preserve restricted_zero_day_instance_only without erasing the restricted boundary
block any promotion from restricted ZeroDayClosure to unrestricted ZeroDayClosure

positive_claim: records a bounded obligation inventory for the still-blocked RestrictedCompositionTarget -> ZeroDayClosure edge
missing_object: actual theorem or witness for RestrictedCompositionTarget -> ZeroDayClosure
non_claims: does not construct an unrestricted zero-day closure
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Discharge or refine each listed obligation before attempting any RestrictedCompositionTarget -> ZeroDayClosure edge.
